gear_crafting.source: Last War: Survival - Gear Crafting Guide. Leveling strategy credits: SHADOWSTRIKE1 on Reddit
core_rules: Only care about UR gear — do not invest in lower rarity gear
Always level gear in 10 level increments
Always buy Blueprints whenever you can
Gear is crafted in the Gear Factory

priority_order: ALL gear to level 10 upon creation
notes: Attack heroes (Kim/Stet) get gun and data chip priority
Defense heroes (Williams/Murphy) get radar and armor priority
Marshall gets gun and data chip for support/buff role
Always level to the next 10-level milestone, never stop mid-increment

strategic_notes: UR gear only — never waste resources on Epic or lower rarity
Blueprints are the key bottleneck — buy every time they appear in any store
Ceramic and Ore are the main crafting materials — farm consistently
Gold costs scale heavily at star levels — prepare reserves before pushing to 1-star+
Mythic Blueprints are rare — required only for 4-star to 5-star upgrade
Concentrate gear upgrades on main squad heroes first, never spread across benched heroes
Attack heroes should have gun and chip prioritised; Defense heroes should have radar and armor prioritised

roi_analysis.source: Calculated from upgrade_costs table - gold/ore efficiency per 10 levels
roi_analysis.note: ROI = stat gain per resource spent. Lower gold cost per level = better early ROI. Higher costs at star levels require planning.

breakpoints: Level 10: safe threshold for all gear
level_0_to_40.recommendation: Get ALL gear to level 40 before pushing stars. Cheapest phase of upgrades.

breakpoints: Ore is cheap at this phase
level_40_to_1star.recommendation: SAVE 93.6M gold before attempting. Only push main DPS hero first.

breakpoints: After 4-star, consider stopping for most heroes
1star_to_4star.recommendation: Phase this over weeks. 2-3 star is breakpoint where many players stop.

4star_to_5star.recommendation: ONLY for top DPS heroes (Kimberly, DVA, Tesla). Wait until mythic blueprints accumulated.

phase_1_level_0_to_40.action: Get ALL gear to level 10 first (safest investment). Then prioritize attack hero weapons (Kimberly gun, DVA gun, Tesla gun)
heroes_to_focus: DVA OR Tesla depending on squad type

phase_2_level_40_to_2star.action: SAVE minimum 200M gold before starting stars. Push main DPS to 1-2 star.
heroes_to_focus: Then consider defensive radar for tank heroes
phase_2_level_40_to_2star.stopping_point: Many players stop at 1-star and skip 2-star (too expensive).

phase_3_level_2star_to_4star.action: Push main DPS to 4-star. This is the hard stop for casual players.
phase_3_level_2star_to_4star.breakpoint_warning: 2-star to 3-star jump (+150M gold) - prepare large reserves

full_sequence.rationale: Baseline investment, required for all heroes
Main DPS - highest priority for attack hero
Attack hero secondary - completes main DPS gear
Star threshold - main DPS power spike
Support hero utility - buffs all squad
Main DPS to 4-star - major power spike, stop here for many
Only if you have massive gold reserves
